original_benchmark.notes: MLS-Bench contains 140 machine-learning science tasks across multiple domains. The native harness stages package workspaces, applies task edit scaffolds, runs visible and hidden evaluation scripts across seeds, and scores with the MLS-Bench combined_score DSL.

harbor_adapter.notes: The adapter renders one Harbor task per MLS-Bench task, with verifier-only scoring assets under tests/ and oracle solutions generated from the strongest native baseline edit_ops.
